title: Anyone Using Monday For Manufacturing & Tracking Inventory? Shopify?

posts.author: BWatts (Bobby Watts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, new to Monday! We are a small business manufacturing intricate consumer products. Our products have about 100-200 different parts that come together to make the product we sell. So, I’ve got two questions:

  1. Is anyone out there using Monday to track their inventory of multiple parts that come together to create a bigger product? If so, what’s the easiest way to link the two together?

  2. We sell our products via Shopify. I see the Shopify integration and it seems easy enough. In essence, would anyone see a problem the workflow of:

Order comes through Shopify → New order on Monday automatically created → Monday inventory now updated in real time → Sends updates if we need to order more stock, etc.

Would all of this be possible?

Thank you in advance!
Bobby

posts.author: Evert (Evert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bobby,

did you find a solution to this? we are in a similar situation but only have about 5-10 parts making up our finished goods.

I’m not quite happy with the Monday x Shopify integration, we had to customize a lot through Integromat for example.

Have you looked at MRP systems like Katana as a solution? seems PERFECT for you!

Thanks,
Evert

posts.author: panders99 (Paul Anders)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have set it up on Monday to do this, but don’t use Shopify.
I used Katana but found it was not very customizable and they made infrequent enhancements.

posts.author: CalebPrince (Caleb Prince)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, have you found a good solution with Monday? Same situation but we don’t use Shopify.

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BWatts and @CalebPrince,

I have an inventory solution and build that would allow for multiple parts to be recognized based on a product order that would be out of the box automations and integrations combination.

It would be interesting to discover what you are looking for and talk through requirements but the essence of what has been posted here i do have for demo.

Reach out to us!

https://www.axanexa.com/contact-us/

Mike B
Automation Architect
